funding_opportunities.label: startup
funding_opportunities.organization: Department for Promotion of Industry and Internal Trade (DPIIT)
funding_opportunities.program_owner: Startup India, DPIIT, Government of India
benefits: Convertible debt up to Rs 50 Lakh

eligibility.summary: DPIIT-recognized startups incorporated less than 2 years ago. Indian promoters holding more than 51% shares. Innovative business idea with market fit. Must apply through SISFS-approved incubators.

funding_opportunities.label: startup
funding_opportunities.program_name: MeitY GENESIS Scheme (Gen-Next Support for Innovative Startups)
funding_opportunities.organization: MeitY Startup Hub (MSH), Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology
funding_opportunities.program_owner: Ministry of Electronics & IT (MeitY), Government of India
benefits: Pilot funding up to Rs 50 Lakh
Early-stage funding up to Rs 10 Lakh
Deep-tech funding up to Rs 1 Cr
Implementation through 50+ agencies in Tier-II/III cities

eligibility.summary: Startups registered with MSH. Indian promoters holding at least 51% shareholding. Full-time CEO with market-ready products. Entities registered under Section 8, incubators, accelerators, and educational institutes recognized by UGC/AICTE.

funding_opportunities.label: startup
funding_opportunities.organization: Biotechnology Industry Research Assistance Council (BIRAC)
funding_opportunities.program_owner: Department of Biotechnology (DBT), Government of India

eligibility.summary: Young startups and innovators in biotechnology. Two calls per year (Jan 1 and Jul 1, open ~45 days). Idea-to-proof-of-concept stage. Must be an Indian entity.

funding_opportunities.label: startup
funding_opportunities.organization: Department of Science & Technology (DST), Government of India
funding_opportunities.program_owner: National Science & Technology Entrepreneurship Development Board (NSTEDB), DST
benefits: Seed support up to Rs 100 Lakh per startup

eligibility.summary: Technology-driven startups incubated at DST-supported TBIs. Indian promoters with 51%+ shareholding. Startups with promising ideas, innovations, and technologies.

funding_opportunities.label: startup
funding_opportunities.organization: Software Technology Parks of India (STPI), MeitY
funding_opportunities.program_owner: Ministry of Electronics & IT (MeitY), Government of India
benefits: Seed funding up to Rs 25 Lakh
Internship grant of Rs 10,000/month for 6 months

eligibility.summary: Tech startups working on software product development or embedded electronics. Available through 12 STPI centres in Tier-II locations (Agartala, Bhilai, Bhopal, Bhubaneswar, Dehradun, Guwahati, Jaipur, Lucknow, Prayagraj, Mohali, Patna, Vijayawada).

funding_opportunities.label: startup
funding_opportunities.organization: Kerala Startup Mission (KSUM)

eligibility.summary: Startups at ideation/design/PoC stage. Innovators based in Kerala. Company incorporation mandatory before fund disbursal. KSUM Unique ID required for disbursal. Only innovative technology-based products considered.

funding_opportunities.label: startup
funding_opportunities.organization: AIC T-Hub Foundation (Atal Incubation Centre)
funding_opportunities.program_owner: T-Hub, Atal Innovation Mission (AIM), NITI Aayog

eligibility.summary: Growth/Acceleration stage startups with MVP ready. Minimum 2 founders. Minimum MRR of Rs 1 Lakh preferred. Received Rs 50 Lakh+ investment or equivalent revenue. Operating in health/life sciences with technology solution.

funding_opportunities.label: startup
funding_opportunities.organization: Accel
benefits: Access to Google AI Futures Fund resources
Early access to Gemini and DeepMind models

eligibility.summary: Indian and Indian-origin founders building AI-first products or breakthrough LeapTech solutions. Pre-product or pre-revenue stage welcome. Companies that have raised under $2M. Sector agnostic for Atoms X; AI focus for Atoms AI cohort.

funding_opportunities.label: startup
funding_opportunities.organization: 100X.VC
benefits: Investment of Rs 1.25 Cr per startup

eligibility.summary: Startups building from India looking to raise first institutional cheque. Any sector, any stage from anywhere in India. Applications accepted on rolling basis.

funding_opportunities.label: startup
funding_opportunities.organization: LetsVenture

eligibility.summary: Sector and stage agnostic. Open from napkin stage to beta to paying users. 20% allocation for women entrepreneurs and Tier 2/3 founders. Minimum investment varies by round.

funding_opportunities.label: startup
funding_opportunities.organization: Kotak Mahindra Bank (through NSRCEL, IIMA Ventures, FITT IIT Delhi, T-Hub)

eligibility.summary: DPIIT-registered startups. Revenue-generating, post-MVP, market-ready. Must have existing customer base. 75+ startups to be accelerated in Season 2 (Oct 2025-Nov 2026).

funding_opportunities.label: startup
funding_opportunities.program_name: Cummins CSR Grant for Climate & Sustainability Tech
funding_opportunities.organization: Cummins India (administered by Venture Center, CSIR-NCL)
benefits: Funds pilot trials and field testing

eligibility.summary: Early-stage technology entrepreneurs and startups working on environmental sustainability and climate change solutions. Solution should be at pilot/field-test ready stage. Focus on clean energy and sustainability domains.

funding_opportunities.label: startup
funding_opportunities.program_name: NSRCEL Impact Orbit - AgeTech Innovations (Capgemini CSR)
funding_opportunities.organization: NSRCEL (IIM Bangalore) & Capgemini
focus_areas: quality of life for older adults

eligibility.summary: Early-revenue stage for-profit or non-profit ventures. Operational for at least 1 year. Proven PoC or pilots. Early traction/customers. At least 1 full-time founder. Impact-first venture with potential to impact 3+ UN SDGs.

funding_opportunities.label: startup
funding_opportunities.organization: ISB I-Venture & Siemens
benefits: Mentorship from Siemens experts and ISB faculty
Access to Siemens labs and R&D

eligibility.summary: Indian-incorporated startups with solutions at TRL 5+. Growth-stage cleantech startups. Digitally enabled solutions (not standalone hardware). Focus on sustainability, energy efficiency, decarbonization. 10-15 startups per cohort.

funding_opportunities.label: startup
funding_opportunities.organization: FITT-IIT Delhi & Boeing
benefits: Mentorship from Boeing engineers and IIT Delhi faculty
Funding & investment opportunities through FITT VC network

eligibility.summary: Students graduating in 2026 or early-stage startups at pre-revenue/idea/conceptualization stage. Domains: aerospace, spacetech, e-mobility, green energy, sustainability, social impact.

funding_opportunities.label: startup
funding_opportunities.organization: Society for Innovation & Entrepreneurship (SINE), IIT Bombay
benefits: Grant facilitation (MeitY TIDE, DST NIDHI, etc.)

eligibility.summary: Technology-driven startups. Preference for IIT Bombay-affiliated founders but open to external. Must be a registered company or willing to register.

funding_opportunities.label: startup
funding_opportunities.organization: I-Hub Foundation for Cobotics (IHFC), IIT Delhi & India Accelerator
benefits: Mentorship from IIT Delhi and India Accelerator

eligibility.summary: Startups in medtech and healthcare with MVP, validated prototype, or early market traction. Solutions must demonstrate scalability and real-world healthcare impact. Technology-led innovation with clinical relevance.

funding_opportunities.label: startup
funding_opportunities.program_name: SIIC IIT Kanpur UDAAN Drone Acceleration Program (Cohort 3)
funding_opportunities.organization: SIIC IIT Kanpur, CoE for UAVs (UP Govt), Drone Federation of India
benefits: Acceleration program with incubation at SIIC IIT Kanpur
Access to Drone CoE testing facilities
Top 6 startups get Rs 3 Lakh fellowship per annum
Demo Day with investors, VCs and defence leaders

eligibility.summary: Registered Private Limited company. DPIIT recognition mandatory. Must operate in UAV/drone sector. Annual turnover under Rs 3 Cr. MVP-stage product required. Open to startups across India.

funding_opportunities.label: startup
funding_opportunities.organization: Foundation for Innovation and Technology Transfer (FITT), IIT Delhi
benefits: Incubation at IIT Delhi Research & Innovation Park

eligibility.summary: Technology-driven startups working on innovative products/processes (preferably first 5 years). Registered as Pvt Ltd in India. Majority (>50%) Indian shareholding. At least one full-time promoter.

funding_opportunities.label: startup
funding_opportunities.organization: Desai Sethi School of Entrepreneurship, IIT Bombay & Groww Foundation
benefits: Track A: Rs 30,000 fixed grant for PoC (~100 teams/year)
Track B: Up to Rs 25 Lakh milestone-based funding (5 teams/year)

eligibility.summary: IIT Bombay students (UG/PG/researchers). Track A: open to UG students from all disciplines. Track B: Year 1 focus on AI Empowered Innovations. Multi-round selection for Track B.

funding_opportunities.label: startup
funding_opportunities.program_name: AIC Mahindra Call for Incubation (2026 Cohort)
funding_opportunities.organization: AIC Mahindra e-Hub (Mahindra University), Atal Innovation Mission
funding_opportunities.program_owner: Mahindra University, Atal Innovation Mission (AIM), NITI Aayog
benefits: Facilitated access to SISFS (up to Rs 20L grant + Rs 50L debt)
Physical incubation at Mahindra University campus

eligibility.summary: Early-stage startups with working PoC or prototype. Registered or willing to register as Pvt Ltd. DeepTech, robotics, EV, mobility, life sciences focus. Solo and student founders welcome. Must be willing to be at Mahindra University campus, Hyderabad.

funding_opportunities.label: startup
funding_opportunities.organization: TiE Bangalore
benefits: Two dedicated TiE Charter Member mentors

eligibility.summary: Revenue-generating startups with early traction or strong market signals. Committed founding team. Sectors include SaaS, AI/Deep Tech, HealthTech, FinTech, ClimateTech, Consumer, Manufacturing, Agritech, D2C, EV/Mobility.

funding_opportunities.label: startup
funding_opportunities.organization: SAMRIDH Impact Solutions Pvt. Ltd. (SISPL)
benefits: Accelerator support up to Rs 1 Cr

eligibility.summary: Early-to-mid-stage startups in healthcare or climate-tech sectors. TRL 4+ (lab-validated technology). Early evidence of real-world impact. Open to startups across all Indian states and UTs.

funding_opportunities.label: startup
funding_opportunities.organization: Reliance Foundation & Gates Foundation

eligibility.summary: Organizations with high-impact evidence-backed solutions for women's digital inclusion in India. Focus on proven, scalable solutions improving lives and livelihoods of women and girls through digital adoption.
